description: Synthetic, sanitized production-style coding-agent memory corpus for ELF adoption benchmarking.

evidence.title: XY-812 Resume Lane
evidence.text: XY-812 resume lane uses branch y/elf-xy-812. The next command is `cargo make trace-gate`; the stale blocker cleared after PR #108 merged.

evidence.title: PR 110 Review Status
evidence.text: PR #110 is review-ready for the ELF viewer lane. It passed `cargo make checks` and waits for the non-draft review handoff.

evidence.title: XY-791 Strict Config Repair
evidence.text: Worktree XY-791 recovered strict-config repair after rebase. The exact gate was `cargo make fmt && cargo make lint-fix && cargo make checks`.

evidence.title: Private Production Corpus Runbook
evidence.text: Private production fixtures use `ELF_BASELINE_PRODUCTION_CORPUS_MANIFEST` with `cargo make baseline-production-private` and stay out of git.

evidence.title: Qdrant Derived Index Decision
evidence.text: Decision: Qdrant remains a rebuildable derived index. Postgres stores source-of-truth vectors, notes, chunks, and audit rows.

evidence.title: Stale Provider Key Blocker
evidence.text: Stale blocker: missing Qwen key applied only to provider stress runs. The synthetic production corpus uses local deterministic embeddings.

evidence.title: XY-640 Ledger Replay Recovery
evidence.text: Recovery note: XY-640 ledger replay resumes from checkpoint `ledger-replay-42` and verifies the retained lane with `cargo make test`.

evidence.title: Superseded Command Decision
evidence.text: Update case: old command `cargo make lint` was superseded by `cargo make lint-fix` for Decodex ELF lanes.

queries.query: How do I resume XY-812 and what command is next?
Recover the exact repair gate command for XY-791 strict config.
expected_terms: cargo make fmt && cargo make lint-fix && cargo make checks

queries.query: Why is the missing Qwen key blocker stale for the synthetic production corpus?
What prior decision explains why Qdrant can be rebuilt?
Which command superseded cargo make lint for Decodex ELF lanes?
